message:
feat(demo): add mouse + keyboard shortcuts to Terminal Capabilities (bd-iuvb.17.13.1)

Mouse click selects capability rows, scroll wheel navigates, number
keys 0-5 jump to common profiles (0=detected, 1=modern..5=dumb).
Keybindings list now includes 8 entries (click, scroll, 0-5, Tab,
arrows, P, R, E). 5 new unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
